Thronglets — Procedural Preview (static render)

All sprites below are generated from one 24×24 base silhouette + 5 ear / 8 eye / 6 mouth / 6 horn / 6 chest / 8 palette options. Same name → same creature, deterministically.

8 showcase specs (hand-crafted)

The named examples from the plan: Vexo (baseline), Kilo, Paxi, etc.
Vexo
palette:amber ears:0 eyes:1 mouth:0 horn:0 chest:0 curious

palette:ember ears:1 eyes:3 mouth:2 horn:1 chest:1 sleepy
Paxi
palette:mint ears:3 eyes:5 mouth:4 horn:3 chest:5 eager

palette:frost ears:2 eyes:0 mouth:1 horn:2 chest:4 calm
Runo
palette:dusk ears:4 eyes:6 mouth:0 horn:5 chest:2 chaotic
Tami
palette:rose ears:0 eyes:2 mouth:3 horn:1 chest:3 calm
Bofi
palette:bone ears:3 eyes:7 mouth:5 horn:4 chest:5 skeptical
Zuka
palette:ink ears:1 eyes:5 mouth:4 horn:2 chest:0 eager
